name: Neiman Marcus $250 Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter with white and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and vanilla, mixing well.
3. Combine the flour, oatmeal, salt, baking powder, and baking soda in a separate bowl.
4. Mix in the chocolate chips (grated) and chopped nuts.
5. Form the mixture into balls about 1 inch in diameter.
6. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake at 375°F for 6 minutes.
8. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
9. This recipe yields approximately 100-150 cookies and can be halved if desired.
